action.reasoning: Observation: Best rmse_z500 so far is 464.80 (from UNet base_channels=64, dropout=0.1, 20 epochs). Validation loss plateaued after epoch 14. Analysis: Model capacity might be limiting, and training could benefit from longer tuning with learning rate scheduling and a higher weight on Z500 (primary metric). Decision: Scale to base_channels=128 for more capacity, set z500_loss_weight=5.0 to focus optimization, switch to ReduceLROnPlateau scheduler, train up to 30 epochs with early stopping patience=15. Reduce batch size to 8 to fit GPU memory. Submit eval after training.
